profession.name: DOCTOR
profession.description: Can treat injuries and diseases. Essential for long-term health.

profession.name: ENGINEER
profession.description: Can maintain and repair bunker systems. Critical for infrastructure.

profession.name: SCIENTIST
profession.description: Research capabilities. May find solutions to external threats.

profession.name: SOLDIER
profession.description: Combat trained. Provides security and defense capabilities.

profession.name: FARMER
profession.description: Expert in food production. Essential for sustainable nutrition.

profession.name: MECHANIC
profession.description: Can repair machinery and vehicles. Useful for equipment maintenance.

profession.name: TEACHER
profession.description: Can educate and train others. Important for knowledge preservation.

profession.name: CHEF
profession.description: Expert in food preparation. Can make limited supplies last longer.

profession.name: PROGRAMMER
profession.description: Can operate and code computer systems. Essential for bunker tech.

profession.name: ELECTRICIAN
profession.description: Specializes in electrical systems. Critical for power maintenance.

profession.name: PSYCHOLOGIST
profession.description: Mental health expert. Can maintain group morale and treat psychological trauma.

profession.name: SECURITY GUARD
profession.description: Trained in surveillance and threat assessment. Keeps order in confined spaces.

profession.name: BIOLOGIST
profession.description: Expert in life sciences. Can analyze samples and develop treatments.

profession.name: LIBRARIAN
profession.description: Knowledge keeper. Knows how to preserve and find vital information.

profession.name: SOCIAL MEDIA INFLUENCER
profession.description: No practical skills. Useless without internet and followers.

profession.name: CRYPTO/NFT TRADER
profession.description: Lost everything in the crash. No survival skills whatsoever.

profession.name: LIFE COACH
profession.description: Motivational quotes won't fix a broken air filter. No tangible skills.

profession.name: REALITY TV STAR
profession.description: Famous for being dramatic. Brings chaos and ego, zero utility.

profession.name: DOOR-TO-DOOR SALESMAN
profession.description: Annoying persistence. Everyone already hates them from before the apocalypse.

profession.name: MALL SANTA
profession.description: Overweight, out of shape. Good with kids but useless in crisis.

profession.name: TELEMARKETER
profession.description: Master of nuisance. Has angered everyone they've ever contacted.

profession.name: PROFESSIONAL GAMER
profession.description: Reflexes are sharp but no physical stamina. Expects others to serve them.

profession.name: CON ARTIST
profession.description: Skilled at deception. Trust them at your own peril.

profession.name: FAILED LAWYER
profession.description: Argues incessantly about everything. Lost every case they've ever had.

biology.name: YOUNG & HEALTHY
biology.description: 25 years old, excellent physical condition. Peak immune system.

biology.name: MIDDLE-AGED
biology.description: 45 years old, decent health. Life experience and stability.

biology.name: ELDERLY
biology.description: 70 years old, frail health. Wisdom and life experience.

biology.name: ATHLETIC
biology.description: Excellent physical fitness. Can perform demanding labor.

biology.name: STRONG IMMUNITY
biology.description: Rare blood type, resistant to most diseases. Biological asset.

biology.name: CHRONIC ILLNESS
biology.description: Requires regular medication. Potential resource drain.

biology.name: HIGHLY FERTILE
biology.description: Excellent reproductive health. Important for population rebuilding.

biology.name: STERILE
biology.description: Cannot reproduce. No long-term genetic contribution.

biology.name: PHYSICALLY DISABLED
biology.description: Limited mobility. May require additional care and resources.

biology.name: GENIUS IQ
biology.description: Exceptional intelligence. Can solve complex problems.

biology.name: INSOMNIAC
biology.description: Requires little sleep. Can maintain night watch and work longer hours.

biology.name: ADAPTIVE METABOLISM
biology.description: Can survive on minimal food and water. Efficient resource usage.

biology.name: COLOR BLIND
biology.description: Cannot distinguish certain colors. Minor limitation in some tasks.

biology.name: SYNESTHESIA
biology.description: Senses are cross-wired. Unusual perception may provide unique insights.

biology.name: HEMOPHILIA
biology.description: Blood doesn't clot properly. Even minor injuries can be fatal.

biology.name: TYPE 1 DIABETES
biology.description: Requires constant insulin. Without medication, will die quickly.

biology.name: EPILEPSY
biology.description: Random seizures without warning. Dangerous around machinery.

biology.name: SEVERE ASTHMA
biology.description: Breathing difficulties. Poor air quality is life-threatening.

biology.name: MORBIDLY OBESE
biology.description: Can barely move. Consumes triple rations. Heart condition imminent.

biology.name: DEAF
biology.description: Cannot hear alarms, warnings, or conversations. Communication barrier.

biology.name: BLIND
biology.description: No vision. Completely dependent on others for basic tasks.

biology.name: SCHIZOPHRENIA
biology.description: Hears voices and has delusions. Unpredictable and potentially dangerous.

biology.name: EXTREME ALLERGIES
biology.description: Severe reactions to common foods and substances. EpiPen dependent.

hobby.name: CHESS MASTER
hobby.description: Expert strategist. Can plan complex operations and tactics.

hobby.name: MUSICIAN
hobby.description: Can maintain morale. Provides cultural enrichment.

hobby.name: GARDENER
hobby.description: Expert in plant cultivation. Useful for food production.

hobby.name: WRITER
hobby.description: Can document experiences. Preserves knowledge and history.

hobby.name: ARTIST
hobby.description: Maintains human culture. Important for mental health.

hobby.name: GAMER
hobby.description: Expert problem solver. Quick thinking under pressure.

hobby.name: SURVIVALIST
hobby.description: Trained in wilderness survival. Adaptability skills.

hobby.name: MEDITATOR
hobby.description: Mentally disciplined. Can maintain calm in crisis.

hobby.name: INVENTOR
hobby.description: Creative problem solver. Can create solutions from limited resources.

hobby.name: HISTORIAN
hobby.description: Knows what works and what doesn't. Learns from past mistakes.

hobby.name: HAM RADIO OPERATOR
hobby.description: Can communicate over long distances. May contact other survivors.

hobby.name: LOCK PICKER
hobby.description: Skilled at opening locks without keys. Useful for accessing sealed areas.

hobby.name: FIRST AID EXPERT
hobby.description: Trained in emergency medicine. Can stabilize injuries until doctor arrives.

hobby.name: HOME BREWER
hobby.description: Knows fermentation and preservation. Can purify water and make antiseptics.

hobby.name: INTERNET TROLL
hobby.description: Spends hours arguing online. Provokes fights for entertainment. No real skills.

hobby.name: PROFESSIONAL COMPLAINER
hobby.description: Expert at finding faults in everything. Demoralizes everyone around them.

hobby.name: JUNK COLLECTOR
hobby.description: Hoards useless items. Bunker space filled with garbage and broken trinkets.

hobby.name: PRANKSTER
hobby.description: Constant practical jokes. Creates tension and wastes resources on 'funny' experiments.

hobby.name: RUMOR MONGER
hobby.description: Spreads misinformation and drama. Destroys trust and cohesion in the group.

hobby.name: MALADAPTIVE DAYDREAMER
hobby.description: Lost in fantasy worlds. Unreliable and disconnected from reality.

hobby.name: COMPULSIVE GAMBLER
hobby.description: Will bet anything on anything. Creates dangerous situations over trivial stakes.

hobby.name: DOOMSCROLLER
hobby.description: Obsessed with catastrophizing. Paralyzed by endless worst-case scenarios.

hobby.name: ONLYFANS ADDICT
hobby.description: Spent fortune on parasocial relationships. No actual social skills or self-respect.

hobby.name: CONSPIRACY THEORIST
hobby.description: Believes Earth is flat and vaccines are mind control. Rejects all science.

phobia.name: CLAUSTROPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of enclosed spaces. Problematic for bunker living.

phobia.name: GERMOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of germs. May cause hygiene obsession.

phobia.name: ARACHNOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of spiders. Generally irrelevant in bunker.

phobia.name: NYCTOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of darkness. Issue during power failures.

phobia.name: AGORAPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of open spaces. Actually beneficial for bunker life.

phobia.name: ACROPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of heights. Not relevant underground.

phobia.name: SOCIAL ANXIETY
phobia.description: Fear of social interaction. Problematic for close quarters.

phobia.name: BLOOD PHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of blood. Problematic for medical emergencies.

phobia.name: ENTOMOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of insects. May be relevant for food production.

phobia.name: NO PHOBIAS
phobia.description: Mentally stable. No irrational fears affecting performance.

phobia.name: THANATOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of death. May panic in life-threatening situations.

phobia.name: MONOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of being alone. Requires constant company.

phobia.name: ATYCHIPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of failure. Paralyzed by high-pressure decisions.

phobia.name: PHILOSOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of philosophy and deep thinking. Avoids complex moral discussions.

phobia.name: COULROPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of clowns. Traumatized by birthday parties. Useless fear in bunker.

phobia.name: DECIDOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of making decisions. Completely paralyzed by choices.

phobia.name: PEDOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of children. Problematic if someone reveals they are pregnant.

phobia.name: HAPHEPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of being touched. Cannot tolerate physical contact of any kind.

phobia.name: LIGYROPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of loud noises. Alarms and machinery cause panic attacks.

phobia.name: CATASTROPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of disasters. Ironically terrified of the exact situation they're in.

phobia.name: EMETOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of vomiting. Refuses to eat suspicious food or help sick people.

phobia.name: TRYPANOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of needles. Cannot receive injections or IV fluids.

phobia.name: PONOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of overworking. Refuses to do any strenuous labor.

phobia.name: ZOOPHOBIA
phobia.description: Fear of animals. Cannot handle livestock or even see pets.

baggage.name: CRIMINAL RECORD
baggage.description: Convicted of violent crimes. Potential security risk.

baggage.name: ADDICTION
baggage.description: Substance dependence. May cause withdrawal issues.

baggage.name: FAMILY MAN
baggage.description: Left family behind. May have emotional breakdown.

baggage.name: FORMERLY WEALTHY
baggage.description: Accustomed to luxury. May struggle with austerity.

baggage.name: RELIGIOUS FANATIC
baggage.description: Extreme beliefs. May cause conflicts with others.

baggage.name: PACIFIST
baggage.description: Refuses to use violence. Problematic for defense.

baggage.name: HOARDER
baggage.description: Compulsive resource accumulation. May cause conflicts.

baggage.name: NATURAL LEADER
baggage.description: Born leader. Can organize and motivate others.

baggage.name: ETERNAL OPTIMIST
baggage.description: Maintains morale. Sees opportunity in crisis.

baggage.name: CHRONIC PESSIMIST
baggage.description: Always expects worst. May depress group morale.

baggage.name: TRUST ISSUES
baggage.description: Paranoid about others' intentions. Suspicious of everyone.

baggage.name: KLEPTOMANIA
baggage.description: Compulsive urge to steal. May take items without permission.

baggage.name: PYROMANIAC
baggage.description: Obsessed with fire. Dangerous in enclosed spaces with flammable materials.

baggage.name: MARTIAL ARTIST
baggage.description: Trained in hand-to-hand combat. Can defend without weapons.

baggage.name: NARCISSIST
baggage.description: Obsessed with self-importance. Cannot tolerate not being the center of attention.

baggage.name: SOCIOPATH
baggage.description: No empathy or conscience. Manipulates others without remorse.

baggage.name: COWARD
baggage.description: Paralyzed by fear when others need them most. Abandons posts in crisis.

baggage.name: LOUD SNORER
baggage.description: Shakes walls with snoring. Keeps everyone awake. Sleep deprivation for all.

baggage.name: HYPOCHONDRIAC
baggage.description: Constantly believes they're dying. Wastes medical supplies on imaginary ailments.

baggage.name: VICTIM MENTALITY
baggage.description: Everything is always someone else's fault. Never takes responsibility.

baggage.name: CONTROL FREAK
baggage.description: Must micromanage everything. Creates conflict by not trusting anyone.

baggage.name: TOXIC PERFECTIONIST
baggage.description: Never satisfied with anything. Criticizes everyone's work endlessly.

baggage.name: DOOMSAYER
baggage.description: Predicts catastrophe every day. Convinced everything will fail.

baggage.name: HYPOCRITE
baggage.description: Preaches rules for others, breaks them constantly. 'Rules for thee, not for me.'

fact.name: SECRETLY IMMUNE
fact.description: Natural immunity to the catastrophe. Unknown to others.

fact.name: SABOTEUR
fact.description: Secretly plans to destroy bunker from within.

fact.name: HIDDEN TALENTS
fact.description: Possesses valuable skills not listed in profession.

fact.name: TERMINAL ILLNESS
fact.description: Less than 1 year to live. May hide this fact.

fact.name: PREGNANT
fact.description: Currently pregnant. Future of humanity depends.

fact.name: DOUBLE AGENT
fact.description: Working for external faction. Gathering intelligence.

fact.name: DISEASE CURE
fact.description: Knows cure for relevant condition. Critical asset.

fact.name: RESOURCE MAP
fact.description: Knows location of hidden supplies. Very valuable.

fact.name: NOTHING SPECIAL
fact.description: Completely ordinary. No hidden advantages or disadvantages.

fact.name: LUCKY CHARM
fact.description: Unusually lucky. Seems to avoid trouble naturally.

fact.name: WITNESS
fact.description: Saw something they shouldn't have. May be targeted by external forces.

fact.name: LOTTERY WINNER
fact.description: Rich before the catastrophe. Bribed their way into the bunker.

fact.name: AMNESIA
fact.description: Cannot remember their past. Identity and skills are unknown even to them.

fact.name: STOWAWAY
fact.description: Not on the official manifest. Snuck in and could be anyone.

fact.name: SECRETLY INFECTED
fact.description: Carries deadly pathogen. Will spread disease to others soon.

fact.name: SERIAL KILLER
fact.description: Has killed before and will kill again. Hiding in plain sight.

fact.name: WANTED CRIMINAL
fact.description: Authorities searching for them. May bring trouble to the bunker.

fact.name: CANNIBAL
fact.description: Already eaten human flesh. Views others as potential food.

fact.name: INFORMANT
fact.description: Reporting bunker location to hostile outside forces.

fact.name: MASTER THIEF
fact.description: Stole something vital before entering. The group is missing critical supplies.

fact.name: IMPOSTOR
fact.description: Not who they claim to be. Stole a real person's identity and credentials.

fact.name: ARSONIST
fact.description: Burned down their previous shelter. Will likely do it again here.

fact.name: ASYMPTOMATIC CARRIER
fact.description: Healthy but spreads deadly disease. Doesn't know they're infected.

fact.name: COMPROMISED
fact.description: Being blackmailed. Forced to sabotage the group or their family dies.
